name: Coping With Colorectal Cancer
summary: Statistically speaking, the 5-year relative survival rate for Stage IIA colorectal cancer is generally high, estimated at over 90%.

name: UNLV mosquito lab: No local mosquitoes have tested positive for West Nile so far
summary: Louisa Messenger, a researcher at UNLV’s mosquito lab, said less than 1 percent of people with West Nile virus develop neuroinvasive cases. The virus crosses the blood-brain barrier and causes symptoms like meningitis and inflammation of the tissues of the brain.

name: Common medications may disrupt brain development
summary: Many people don't think twice when their doctor prescribes antidepressants or other medications, but new research suggests that some of these drugs may subtly interfere with brain development in unborn babies, raising urgent questions about their safety during pregnancy.

name: Daylight saving time linked to heightened mental health risks, review finds
summary: Study comes amid growing calls to end the seasonal practice of changing clocks in the U.S.

name: As Primm's final casino prepares to close, one business is betting on the town’s future
summary: For decades, the lights of Primm served as a welcome sign for travelers crossing from California into Nevada, signaling that Las Vegas was just ahead. Now, that tradition is set to come to an end.

name: Las Vegas father, daughter celebrate matching graduations
summary: A unique feat for a father and daughter here in Las Vegas, finishing school at the same time with perfect 4.0 GPAs. Ebenezer Belete graduated with his PhD from UNLV while his daughter, 16-year-old Tracy Belete, graduated from high school.

name: Circus Meets Medicine Medical Conference
summary: Scott McDonald and Dr. Nathan Hollister — co-founders of Circus Meets Medicine and UNLV Consortium of Arts + Medicine — joined us with the details on their Circus Meets Medicine Medical Conference.

name: 7 Nevada stereotypes and stories that aren’t true at all. Or, are they?
summary: From the pronunciation of the state’s name to the existence of nefarious underwater creatures, we’ll fill you in on what’s true, false, or unconfirmed about Nevada.

name: Barry Diller’s People Incorporated Offers $18B to Take MGM Private
summary: The proposal comes days after Fertitta Entertainment agreed to acquire Caesars Entertainment, putting two of the largest U.S. casino operators at the center of major takeover deals.
